name: Tracing Agentic Failure from the Flow of Success
summary: arXiv:2607.12747v1 Announce Type: new Abstract: Failure attribution for LLM-based agentic systems, i.e., identifying which steps in a failure trajectory caused the task to fail, is critical for deb...
description: arXiv:2607.12747v1 Announce Type: new Abstract: Failure attribution for LLM-based agentic systems, i.e., identifying which steps in a failure trajectory caused the task to fail, is critical for debugging and improving these systems. Existing approaches either rely on prompting-based pipelines, which are computationally expensive, or require post-training on failure trajectories with step-level...
author: Samuel Yeh, Yiwen Zhu, Shaleen Deep, Sharon Li
